description: Machine-readable calendar of every monthly deadline by entity type and obligation. All dates assume no weekend/holiday adjustment unless noted. Adjustments apply per Act 280/2009 § 33 (next business day if deadline falls on weekend/holiday).

monthly_obligations.name: Daňové přiznání DPH
monthly_obligations.notes: Same deadline as KH and SH

monthly_obligations.name: Kontrolní hlášení
monthly_obligations.notes: Paper NOT accepted. Quarterly payers file KH monthly regardless of DAP period.

monthly_obligations.name: Souhrnné hlášení
monthly_obligations.notes: Only required in months where ICD or qualifying B2B cross-border services occurred

monthly_obligations.name: Pojistné na sociální zabezpečení (SP)
monthly_obligations.notes: Both employer and employee portions combined into one payment. Variable symbol = employer registration number.

monthly_obligations.name: Pojistné na zdravotní pojištění (ZP)
monthly_obligations.notes: Separate payment to each health insurer where employees are enrolled (VZP, CPZP, OZP, ZPMV, RBP, etc.)

monthly_obligations.name: Přehled o výši pojistného ČSSZ
monthly_obligations.notes: Separate from the payment; must include employee count and total assessment base

monthly_obligations.name: Záloha na daň ze závislé činnosti
monthly_obligations.notes: DPH srážková (flat rate) and zálohová (progressive) both due 20th. Variable symbol = employer DIČ.

monthly_obligations.name: Výplata čisté mzdy
monthly_obligations.notes: Date set in employment contract (výplatní termín). Typically last working day of month or 5th–15th of following month. If no date agreed: last day of calendar month per Act 262/2006 § 141.

platce_DPH_monthly.description: Plátce DPH with turnover ≥ 10M CZK in prior year, or newly registered plátce (first 12 months)

platce_DPH_quarterly.description: Plátce DPH with turnover < 10M CZK and registered > 12 months
platce_DPH_quarterly.note: KH is monthly even for quarterly DAP payers

neplátce_no_employees.note: No monthly statutory filings unless special situations (identifikovana_osoba self-assessment)

2026_adjusted_dates.note: Dates where the standard 20th or 25th deadline falls on a weekend or public holiday. Per Act 280/2009 § 33, deadline moves to next business day.

adjusted_deadlines_DPH_25th._note: All months where 25th falls on weekend/holiday — deadline shifts to next business day (Act 280/2009 § 33). Verified by V4.3 2026-05-24.

adjusted_deadlines_SP_ZP_20th._note: All months where 20th falls on weekend/holiday — deadline shifts to next business day. SP/ZP deadline (Act 589/1992 § 17, Act 592/1992 § 5). Verified by V4.3 2026-05-24.

2026_adjusted_dates.confidence: high — verified by V4.3 2026-05-24 using Python datetime against Act 245/2000 Sb. public holidays list. Corrections applied: DPH added Jan 26 and Apr 27; SP/ZP section added with all 12 months.

retention_requirements.danove_doklady: 10 years from end of calendar year of transaction (Act 235/2004 § 35a)
retention_requirements.accounting_books: 5 years from end of accounting period (Act 563/1991 § 31)
